column6: The Laumas AF is a miniature stainless steel single-point load cell designed for compact 150 to 150 mm platforms, available in capacities of 5, 15, and 50 kg with IP65 protection. Built from AISI 420 stainless steel with ATEX/IECEx options, it delivers reliable off-center load compensation in a small footprint ideal for benchtop and light-duty industrial scales.
column7:
AF single-point load cell is a precision Italian-engineered miniature weighing sensor designed to fit directly beneath small platforms of up to 150 - 150 mm. A single-point (also called off-center) load cell measures the total load applied anywhere across the platform surface accurately, without requiring multiple sensors. The AF's AISI 420 stainless steel construction provides durability and corrosion resistance, while its compact dimensions make it the first choice for OEM integrators building small benchtop, retail, or laboratory scales. Available with ATEX/IECEx certification for hazardous locations, the AF delivers consistent, reliable performance across a wide range of light-duty industrial and commercial weighing tasks.

Most Common Applications: Compact bench scales, retail counter scales, postal scales, laboratory balances, OEM platform scales, medical device weighing.

column7:

A single load cell placed beneath the center of the platform measures the total weight accurately regardless of where on the platform surface the load is placed, simplifying scale construction and reducing cost. Its top-level C5 accuracy class makes it suitable for high-precision applications such as certified check-weighers, counting scales, and trade-approved compact platforms. ATEX/IECEx versions extend its reach into hazardous industrial environments.

column7:
The AZL is a widely used single-point load cell designed for the popular 400 - 400 mm platform size, covering capacities from 10 to 100 kg with OIML R60 C3/C4 accuracy class certification. Its NTEP approval makes it a trusted choice for legal-for-trade platform scales in North America, where certified accuracy is required for commercial transactions. A single AZL placed at the center of the platform accurately compensates for off-center loading across the entire platform surface, eliminating the need for multiple load cells and reducing system complexity and cost. ATEX/IECEx hazardous area versions further broaden its industrial applicability.

Most Common Applications: Commercial platform scales, floor scales, retail trade scales, OEM scale manufacturing, industrial process weighing, counting scales.
